message:
fix(connector): reject NaN/Inf max_response_ratio in anti-amplification policy validation

NaN max_response_ratio passed `<= 0.0` check (NaN <= 0.0 is false in IEEE 754),
then `ratio > NaN` was always false, silently disabling all ratio-based
amplification blocking. Add is_finite() guard to fail-closed on non-finite values.

Closes bd-1ofy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
